messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como migrar GCP Cloud Storage para OCI Object Storage?

Para migrar GCP Cloud Storage para OCI Object Storage:

**Pré-requisitos:**
1. Criar bucket no OCI Object Storage
2. Configurar OCI CLI com Auth Token
3. Instalar GCP SDK (gcloud)

**Método 1: gsutil + OCI CLI**
```
# 1. Listar objetos no GCS
gsutil ls gs://meu-bucket-gcp

# 2. Download do GCS
gsutil -m cp -r gs://meu-bucket-gcp/* /tmp/gcs-data/

# 3. Upload para OCI
oci os object bulk-upload \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci \
  --src-dir /tmp/gcs-data \
  --parallel-upload-count 10
```

**Método 2: Rclone (direto)**
```
# Configurar remotes
[google-cloud-storage]
type = google cloud storage
project_number = 123456789
service_account_file = /path/to/key.json

[oci-os]
type = s3
provider = Other
endpoint = https://<namespace>.compat.objectstorage.us-ashburn-1.oraclecloud.com
access_key_id = <oci-key>
secret_access_key = <oci-auth-token>

# Sync
rclone sync google-cloud-storage:meu-bucket-gcp oci-os:meu-bucket-oci --progress
```

**Mapeamento:**
- GCS Bucket → OCI Bucket
- GCS Object → OCI Object
- GCS Storage Classes (Standard, Nearline, Coldline, Archive) → OCI Tiers (Standard, IA, Archive)

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como usar gsutil para transferência de dados do GCP Cloud Storage para OCI?

gsutil é a ferramenta oficial do GCP para Cloud Storage:

**Instalação:**
```
# Via gcloud SDK
gcloud components install gsutil

# Ou standalone
pip install gsutil
```

**Migração em duas etapas:**

**Etapa 1: Download do GCS**
```
# Download paralelo de bucket inteiro
gsutil -m cp -r gs://meu-bucket-gcp/** /tmp/gcs-migration/

# Download com verificação de integridade
gsutil -m cp -r -P gs://meu-bucket-gcp/** /tmp/gcs-migration/
```

**Etapa 2: Upload para OCI**
```
oci os object bulk-upload \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci \
  --src-dir /tmp/gcs-migration \
  --parallel-upload-count 20 \
  --content-type "auto"
```

**Otimizações:**
- `-m`: modo paralelo (usa múltiplas threads)
- Para buckets grandes, filtre por prefixos:
```
gsutil -m cp -r gs://meu-bucket-gcp/prefixo1/* /tmp/gcs-migration/prefixo1/
gsutil -m cp -r gs://meu-bucket-gcp/prefixo2/* /tmp/gcs-migration/prefixo2/
```

**Verificação:**
```
# Contar objetos no GCS
gsutil ls -r gs://meu-bucket-gcp/** | wc -l

# Contar objetos no OCI
oci os object list --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci --all | jq '.data | length'
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/usingtheCLI.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como migrar buckets e objetos do GCP Cloud Storage para OCI?

Migrar múltiplos buckets do GCS para OCI:

**Script de migração:**
```
#!/bin/bash
# migrate-gcs-to-oci.sh

# Listar todos os buckets
buckets=$(gsutil ls | sed 's|gs://||' | sed 's|/||')

for bucket in $buckets; do
  echo "Migrando bucket: $bucket"
  
  # Criar bucket no OCI
  oci os bucket create \
    --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
    --name "gcs-${bucket}"
  
  # Download do GCS
  gsutil -m cp -r "gs://${bucket}/**" "/tmp/migration/${bucket}/"
  
  # Upload para OCI
  oci os object bulk-upload \
    --bucket-name "gcs-${bucket}" \
    --src-dir "/tmp/migration/${bucket}" \
    --parallel-upload-count 10
  
  echo "Bucket $bucket migrado"
done
```

**Mapeamento de storage classes:**

| GCS | OCI | Uso |
|-----|-----|-----|
| Standard | Standard | Acesso frequente |
| Nearline | Infrequent Access | Acesso mensal |
| Coldline | Infrequent Access | Acesso trimestral |
| Archive | Archive | Acesso anual |

**Preservar metadata:**
```
# Exportar metadata do GCS
gsutil ls -L gs://meu-bucket/** > gcs-metadata.txt

# Os metadados de objeto são preservados automaticamente pelo OCI CLI
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/managingobjects.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como resolver erros de transferência ao migrar GCP Cloud Storage para OCI?

Erros comuns na migração GCS → OCI:

**1. Erro de autenticação GCP:**
```
# Verificar autenticação
gcloud auth login
gcloud auth application-default login

# Verificar permissões
gsutil ls gs://meu-bucket
```

**2. Erro de autenticação OCI:**
```
oci os ns get
# Se falhar, verificar configuração
oci setup config
```

**3. Timeout de transferência:**
```
# Aumentar timeouts
oci os object bulk-upload \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket \
  --src-dir /tmp/data \
  --socket-timeout 120
```

**4. Erro de objeto grande:**
```
# OCI CLI suporta multipart automaticamente
oci os object put \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket \
  --file grande-arquivo \
  --multipart-threshold 104857600
```

**5. Erro de rate limiting:**
```
# Reduzir paralelismo
gsutil -o GSUtil:parallel_thread_count=5 -m cp -r gs://bucket/* /tmp/
oci os object bulk-upload --parallel-upload-count 5 --src-dir /tmp/
```

**6. Erro de espaço em disco:**
Use streaming com rclone ao invés de download local:
```
rclone sync google-cloud-storage:bucket oci-os:bucket --buffer-size 64M
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/usingtheCLI.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como validar integridade de dados migrados do GCP Cloud Storage para OCI?

Validação de integridade pós-migração GCS → OCI:

**1. Comparação de contagens:**
```
# GCS
gsutil ls -r gs://meu-bucket/** | wc -l

# OCI
oci os object list --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci --all | jq '.data | length'
```

**2. Comparação de tamanhos:**
```
# GCS total size
gsutil du -sh gs://meu-bucket

# OCI total size
oci os object list --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci --all \
  --query 'data[].size' --output tsv | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}'
```

**3. Comparação de hashes:**
```
# GCS: obter hashes
gsutil ls -L gs://meu-bucket/** | grep "Hash (crc32c)" > gcs-hashes.txt

# OCI: obter hashes
oci os object list --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci --all --fields md5 > oci-hashes.txt

# Comparar
```

**4. Validação com script Python:**
```python
import subprocess
import json

def get_gcs_objects(bucket):
    result = subprocess.run(['gsutil', 'ls', '-L', f'gs://{bucket}/**'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    return result.stdout

def get_oci_objects(bucket):
    result = subprocess.run(['oci', 'os', 'object', 'list', '--bucket-name', bucket, '--all'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    return json.loads(result.stdout)['data']

gcs_count = len(get_gcs_objects('meu-bucket').strip().split('\n\n'))
oci_count = len(get_oci_objects('meu-bucket-oci'))
print(f"GCS: {gcs_count}, OCI: {oci_count}")
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/managingobjects.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como migrar lifecycle policies do GCP Cloud Storage para OCI?
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como troubleshootar permissões de acesso pós-migração do GCP para OCI?

Problemas de permissão pós-migração GCS → OCI:

**Diferenças de modelo:**
- GCP: IAM roles + bucket policies + signed URLs
- OCI: IAM Policies + Auth Tokens + PARs

**Criar IAM Policy:**
```
oci iam policy create \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --name "storage-access" \
  --statements '[
    "Allow group StorageAdmins to manage object-family in compartment MigrationCompartment",
    "Allow group AppServices to read objects in compartment MigrationCompartment where target.bucket.name = '\''meu-bucket-oci'\''"
  ]'
```

**Troubleshooting:**

| Erro | Causa | Solução |
|------|-------|--------|
| 403 Forbidden | Sem IAM policy | Criar policy |
| Auth failed | Token expirado | Regenerar |
| CORS error | CORS não configurado | Adicionar rules |

**CORS:**
```
oci os bucket update \
  --namespace-name <namespace> \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci \
  --cors-rules '[{
    "allowed-origins": ["https://meuapp.com"],
    "allowed-methods": ["GET", "PUT"]
  }]'
```

**Signed URLs → PARs:**
```
oci os preauth-request create \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket-oci \
  --name "app-access" \
  --access-type ObjectRead \
  --time-expires 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Identity/Concepts/policies.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como estimar tempo de migração do GCP Cloud Storage para OCI?

Estimar tempo de migração GCS → OCI:

**Fatores:**
1. Volume total de dados
2. Número de objetos
3. Largura de banda
4. Tamanho médio dos objetos

**Estimativas:**

| Volume | Largura de Banda | Tempo Estimado |
|--------|-----------------|----------------|
| 1TB | 500 Mbps | ~5 horas |
| 1TB | 1 Gbps | ~2.5 horas |
| 10TB | 1 Gbps | ~1 dia |
| 50TB | 1 Gbps | ~5 dias |

**Cálculo:**
```
1TB = 8Tb
8Tb / 1Gbps = 8000 segundos = ~2.2 horas (teórico)
Com overhead de 30%: ~3 horas
```

**Custos:** [MUTABLE]
- Egress GCS: varia por região [CHECK DOCS]
- Ingress OCI: gratuito

**Recomendações:**
- Use rclone para migração direta
- Execute em paralelo por prefixos
- Considere migração incremental

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como migrar signed URLs do GCP para Pre-Authenticated Requests do OCI?

GCP signed URLs → OCI Pre-Authenticated Requests (PARs):

**Diferenças:**
- GCP signed URLs: assinados com service account key
- OCI PARs: gerenciados pelo serviço

**Criar PARs:**
```
oci os preauth-request create \
  --bucket-name meu-bucket \
  --name "par-leitura" \
  --access-type ObjectRead \
  --object-name "arquivo.pdf" \
  --time-expires 2025-12-31T23:59:59Z
```

**Migração de aplicação:**

Antes (GCP):
```python
from google.cloud import storage
client = storage.Client()
bucket = client.bucket('meu-bucket')
blob = bucket.blob('arquivo.pdf')
url = blob.generate_signed_url(expiration=3600)
```

Depois (OCI):
```python
import oci
config = oci.config.from_file()
os_client = oci.object_storage.ObjectStorageClient(config)
namespace = os_client.get_namespace().data

par = os_client.create_preauthenticated_request(
    namespace_name=namespace,
    bucket_name="meu-bucket",
    create_preauthenticated_request_details=oci.object_storage.models.CreatePreauthenticatedRequestDetails(
        name="par-temp",
        access_type="ObjectRead",
        object_name="arquivo.pdf",
        time_expires="2025-12-31T23:59:59Z"
    )
)
url = f"https://objectstorage.us-ashburn-1.oraclecloud.com{par.data.access_uri}"
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Object/Tasks/usingpreauthenticatedrequests.htm
You are an OCI specialist with expertise in GCP to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on GCP Cloud Storage to OCI Object Storage migration.
Como migrar GCP persistent disks para OCI Block Volumes via Object Storage?

Para migrar GCP Persistent Disks para OCI Block Volumes:

**1. Criar snapshot:**
```
gcloud compute disks snapshot meu-disk \
  --snapshot-names disk-snapshot \
  --zone us-central1-a
```

**2. Exportar como imagem:**
```
gcloud compute images create exported-disk \
  --source-snapshot disk-snapshot

gcloud compute images export \
  --image exported-disk \
  --destination-uri gs://export-bucket/disk.qcow2 \
  --export-format qcow2
```

**3. Download e upload:**
```
gsutil cp gs://export-bucket/disk.qcow2 ./
oci os object put --bucket-name migration-bucket --name disk.qcow2 --file ./disk.qcow2
```

**4. Criar Block Volume:**
```
oci bv volume create \
  --availability-domain AD-1 \
  --compartment-id ocid1.compartment.oc1..exampleID \
  --display-name "migrated-gcp-disk" \
  --size-in-gbs 100 \
  --source-details '{"type": "objectStorageTuple", "namespaceName": "<ns>", "bucketName": "migration-bucket", "objectName": "disk.qcow2"}'
```

**5. Attach:**
```
oci compute volume-attachment attach \
  --instance-id ocid1.instance.oc1..exampleID \
  --volume-id ocid1.volume.oc1..exampleID \
  --type paravirtualized
```

Referência: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Block/Tasks/cloningablockvolume.htm
